auth.label: API Key
auth.description: BALLDONTLIE API key sent in the Authorization header. Create a free account and view your API key from the official BALLDONTLIE dashboard: https://www.balldontlie.io/.

actions.name: get_match
actions.description: Retrieve one FIFA World Cup match from BALLDONTLIE.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one BALLDONTLIE World Cup match.

outputSchema.description: The BALLDONTLIE World Cup match response.

actions.name: list_futures_odds
actions.description: List FIFA World Cup futures odds from BALLDONTLIE.

season.description: The FIFA World Cup season year, such as 2018, 2022, or 2026.

search.description: Search text used by BALLDONTLIE to filter players.

items.description: A BALLDONTLIE player injury status filter.
A BALLDONTLIE betting odds vendor filter.

propType.description: A BALLDONTLIE player prop market type.

page.description: The page number to request from BALLDONTLIE.

perPage.description: The number of records per page to request from BALLDONTLIE.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for filtering BALLDONTLIE World Cup resources.

futuresOdds.description: The futures odds returned by BALLDONTLIE.

anyOf.description: The next page number when available.

outputSchema.description: The BALLDONTLIE World Cup futuresOdds response.
